input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.6.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.6.4
            TITLE: the imd must monitor the tractive system for:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.6.4: The IMD must monitor the Tractive System for:
EV.7.6.4 The IMD must monitor the Tractive System for: 
a. An isolation failure
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 104 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
b. A failure in the IMD operation 
This must be done without the influence of any programmable logic.

final_answer:
The IMD must monitor the Tractive System for:
a. An isolation failure
b. A failure in the IMD operation
This must be done without the influence of any programmable logic.
